markdown:
# Ring of Invisibility

- **Type**: RG|XDMG

While wearing this ring, you can take a [[magic]] action to give yourself the [[invisible]] condition. You remain [[invisible]] until the ring is removed or until you take a [[bonus_action Action]] to become visible again.
